audience: SME owners, marketers and subject-matter experts turning professional expertise into useful, discoverable and persuasive website content
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Dienstverleners leren hoe zij dienstenpagina's, kennisartikels, cases, FAQ's, bewijs, CTA's, interne links en meting als één controleerbaar contentmodel organiseren

searchIntent.question: How should a service business organise service pages, articles, case studies and FAQs into a coherent SEO content model?
searchIntent.geographicContext: English-speaking SMEs and professional service businesses in Belgium

longTailKeywords: SEO content model for service businesses
how to write a service page
directAnswer: Give every URL one clear job: a service page helps prospects assess the offer, an article answers one independent question, a case study provides verifiable evidence and an FAQ resolves short remaining doubts. Connect those pages with purposeful internal links, appropriate CTAs, named sources and metrics suited to each page type.
title: SEO content for service businesses: model and content brief
metaDescription: Build SEO content for services with clear roles for service pages, articles, case studies and FAQs, plus sources, internal links and a practical brief.
h1: SEO content for service businesses: from content model to strong brief
factsToPreserve: Google removed FAQ rich results on 7 May 2026
There is no universally ideal word count
A service page, article, case study and FAQ have distinct primary jobs
Statistics and outcomes require known definitions, periods and sources
SEO, AEO and GEO do not guarantee rankings or AI citations
Each page type needs metrics appropriate to its function
